name: Calendar
description: Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

api.name: Calendar
api.description: Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected day in single-selection mode. Ignored when IsRange or IsMultiple is set. Pair with ValueChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode.

parameters.name: MinDate
parameters.description: Earliest selectable day. Days before it render disabled and the "previous month" navigation stops at the containing month.

parameters.name: MaxDate
parameters.description: Latest selectable day. Days after it render disabled and the "next month" navigation stops at the containing month.

parameters.name: IsRange
parameters.description: When true, the grid selects a start/end range instead of a single day. Takes precedence over Value selection.

parameters.name: RangeStart
parameters.description: The range's start day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeStartChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: RangeStartChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the range's start day changes.

parameters.name: RangeEnd
parameters.description: The range's end day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeEndChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: RangeEndChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the range's end day changes.

parameters.name: IsMultiple
parameters.description: When true the grid selects a set of independent days: clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of Values. Takes precedence over single Value selection; ignored when IsRange is set.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected days in multiple-selection mode. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: ValuesChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple).

parameters.name: NumberOfMonths
parameters.description: Number of month panels rendered side by side. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: ShowWeekNumbers
parameters.description: When true, adds a leading column showing each row's ISO week number. Default is false.

parameters.name: ShowYearPicker
parameters.description: Convenience shortcut that opens the calendar straight into the year-picker view, overriding InitialView. Default is false.

parameters.name: InitialView
parameters.description: The view (days/months/years) the calendar first renders. Defaults to Days; overridden by ShowYearPicker.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Predicate that marks individual dates as non-selectable, in addition to the MinDate/MaxDate bounds.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Returns extra CSS classes to append to a specific day's button, e.g. to highlight holidays or booked dates.

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Optional per-date tooltip text. Returned string is shown via the styled Lumeo <Tooltip> on hover/focus (not the native browser title attribute). Return null or empty for no tooltip on that date. Useful for booking calendars: "Booked by John, 14:00–17:00" or "Sold out".

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Optional per-date indicator slot. Returns a RenderFragment rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell — good for status dots, count badges, icons. Return null for no badge on that date. The slot is non-interactive (pointer-events-none) so clicks still hit the day button.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: The day of the week to render in the leftmost column. When null (default), uses CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.DateTimeFormat.FirstDayOfWeek — so de-DE / fr-FR / etc. start on Monday automatically, en-US on Sunday. Pass an explicit DayOfWeek to override.

parameters.name: SwipeEnabled
parameters.description: When true (default), users can swipe left/right on the day grid to navigate to the next or previous month on touch devices. Vertical page scroll is unaffected (touch-action: pan-y). Set to false to disable swipe navigation.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode.

events.name: RangeStartChanged
events.description: Raised when the range's start day changes.

events.name: RangeEndChanged
events.description: Raised when the range's end day changes.

events.name: ValuesChanged
events.description: Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple).

examples.title: Date Range Display
examples.code: @if (_checkIn.HasValue) { Check-in: @_checkIn.Value.ToString("MMM d, yyyy") }

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<Calendar @bind-Value="_date" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" />

@code {
    private DateOnly? _date;
    private DateOnly _minDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(-7));
    private DateOnly _maxDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(30));
}

mdSummary:
# Calendar

Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/calendar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Calendar | Value | `DateOnly?` | `` | The selected day in single-selection mode. Ignored when IsRange or IsMultiple is set. Pair with ValueChanged for two-way binding. |
| Calendar | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` | Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode. |
| Calendar | MinDate | `DateOnly?` | `` | Earliest selectable day. Days before it render disabled and the "previous month" navigation stops at the containing month. |
| Calendar | MaxDate | `DateOnly?` | `` | Latest selectable day. Days after it render disabled and the "next month" navigation stops at the containing month. |
| Calendar | IsRange | `bool` | `false` | When true, the grid selects a start/end range instead of a single day. Takes precedence over Value selection. |
| Calendar | RangeStart | `DateOnly?` | `` | The range's start day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeStartChanged for two-way binding. |
| Calendar | RangeStartChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` | Raised when the range's start day changes. |
| Calendar | RangeEnd | `DateOnly?` | `` | The range's end day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeEndChanged for two-way binding. |
| Calendar | RangeEndChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` | Raised when the range's end day changes. |
| Calendar | IsMultiple | `bool` | `false` | When true the grid selects a set of independent days: clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of Values. Takes precedence over single Value selection; ignored when IsRange is set. |
| Calendar | Values | `List<DateOnly>?` | `` | The selected days in multiple-selection mode. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding. |
| Calendar | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<DateOnly>?>` | `` | Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple). |
| Calendar | NumberOfMonths | `int` | `1` | Number of month panels rendered side by side. Defaults to 1. |
| Calendar | ShowWeekNumbers | `bool` | `false` | When true, adds a leading column showing each row's ISO week number. Default is false. |
| Calendar | ShowYearPicker | `bool` | `false` | Convenience shortcut that opens the calendar straight into the year-picker view, overriding InitialView. Default is false. |
| Calendar | InitialView | `CalendarView` | `CalendarView.Days` | The view (days/months/years) the calendar first renders. Defaults to Days; overridden by ShowYearPicker. |
| Calendar | IsDateDisabled | `Func<DateTime, bool>?` | `` | Predicate that marks individual dates as non-selectable, in addition to the MinDate/MaxDate bounds. |
| Calendar | DateClass | `Func<DateTime, string>?` | `` | Returns extra CSS classes to append to a specific day's button, e.g. to highlight holidays or booked dates. |
| Calendar | DateTooltip | `Func<DateTime, string?>?` | `` | Optional per-date tooltip text. Returned string is shown via the styled Lumeo \<Tooltip\> on hover/focus (not the native browser title attribute). Return null or empty for no tooltip on that date. Useful for booking calendars: "Booked by John, 14:00–17:00" or "Sold out". |
| Calendar | DateBadge | `Func<DateTime, RenderFragment?>?` | `` | Optional per-date indicator slot. Returns a RenderFragment rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell — good for status dots, count badges, icons. Return null for no badge on that date. The slot is non-interactive (pointer-events-none) so clicks still hit the day button. |
| Calendar | FirstDayOfWeek | `DayOfWeek?` | `` | The day of the week to render in the leftmost column. When null (default), uses CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.DateTimeFormat.FirstDayOfWeek — so de-DE / fr-FR / etc. start on Monday automatically, en-US on Sunday. Pass an explicit DayOfWeek to override. |
| Calendar | SwipeEnabled | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), users can swipe left/right on the day grid to navigate to the next or previous month on touch devices. Vertical page scroll is unaffected (touch-action: pan-y). Set to false to disable swipe navigation. |
| Calendar | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| Calendar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`) — Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode.
- `RangeStartChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`) — Raised when the range's start day changes.
- `RangeEndChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`) — Raised when the range's end day changes.
- `ValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<DateOnly>?>`) — Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple).

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `ArrowLeft` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles ArrowLeft in Calendar.razor
- `ArrowRight` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles ArrowRight in Calendar.razor
- `ArrowUp` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles ArrowUp in Calendar.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles ArrowDown in Calendar.razor
- `Home` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles Home in Calendar.razor
- `End` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles End in Calendar.razor
- `PageUp` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles PageUp in Calendar.razor
- `PageDown` — HandleDayKeyDownAsync handles PageDown in Calendar.razor

## Example
```razor
<Calendar />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Calendar/Calendar.razor`
